title: SAFE OF COLUMBIA COUNTY - 211info
text: SAFE OF COLUMBIA COUNTY SAFE OF COLUMBIA COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a helpline, information and referral, and counseling. 2194 Columbia Boulevard Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Any survivor of domestic violence or sexual assault Hours: Helpline: 24 hours per day/ 7 days per week Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 397-6161 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (503) 397-6161 Toll-free (866) 397-6161 Helpline Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information; accepts collect calls FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clatsop and Columbia Counties SITE HOURS: Office: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, closed holidays Services: Domestic Violence Hotlines Sexual Assault Hotlines Specialized Information and Referral * Domestic Violence Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Sexual Assault Issues Spouse/Intimate Partner Abuse Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - THE SAFE HOUSE MUTUAL SUPPORT - SUPPORT GROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SAFE OF COLUMBIA COUNTY
